calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:18 am and concluding at 9:24 am

Plaintiff Redwood Fire and Casualty Isurance Company is represented by Kathleen Sauer, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Pacific Grain & Foods LLC not appearing.

SETH BLEDSOE is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies via zoom video conference.

Plaintiff Redwood Fire and Casualty Isurance Company submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Policy.....................ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Redwood Fire and Casualty Isurance Company, and against Defendant Pacific Grain & Foods LLC, as follows:

1. Damages: $184,680.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $25,902.08
3. Attorney Fees: $3,000.00
4. Costs: $548.85

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $214,130.93
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
